reminders.text: Scan tasks/ for duplicates, misplaced files, stale drafts
git status --short. Check branch, uncommitted changes, remote divergence.
No operator contact in 10 min — notify current status
Document conversation since last log entry. Write to logs/session/YYYYMM/DD/HHmmss/.
Check for unfiled Telegram dumps. Scan chat history for document messages since last filed dump in logs/telegram/. Download and file any missing.
